hook: Your AI gives the same answer to you as it does to your most chaotic coworker. That should bother you more than it does.
caption:
Your AI gives the same answer to you as it does to your most chaotic coworker. That should bother you more than it does.

Think about it. You ask ChatGPT to help you write a project brief. So does the guy who thinks 'structured thinking' means making a bullet point that says 'do stuff.'

You get the same template. The same tone. The same generic opener that starts with 'Certainly!' like it's a Victorian butler.

AI doesn't know that you:
— Already hate fluffy intros
— Think in frameworks before you think in words
— Need the 'why' before you can act on anything
— Will actually read the caveats, so include them

It just... guesses. Every single time. From zero.

That's the real friction people feel but can't name. It's not that AI is bad. It's that AI is a brilliant stranger who knows nothing about how your brain works.

BootFile fixes the stranger problem.

You answer a set of questions about how you think, make decisions, and communicate — and we build a portable AI instruction profile that travels with you across every tool.

Same you. Every conversation. No re-explaining yourself.

The brief you write tomorrow should sound like YOU wrote it. Not like a committee drafted it at 2pm on a Wednesday.

Link in bio to build your profile.
